changelog.change: · fixes a possible crash when slide to go to profile.
· Updated base IPA to TikTok v44.6.0

descriptionlist.longdescription:
In App Purchase: $3.99

In-App Settings:
• To enter settings, long press on the Profile tab and click the ⚙️ Gear icon.
• Download videos from FEED, Profile, Explore.
• Save photos from FEED, Stories, and Profiles.
• Merge photos and music From post together.
• Save Profiles avatar or expand it.
• Block all promo ads in Feed, Stories, and Explore.
• Quick Seen / Unseen toggle for Stories and DMs.
• Hide tabs such as Friends, Create, and inbox.
• Copy profiles bio.
• Add toggle Auto Like for live streming.
• Stream Post from Specific country.
• Add country Flags and post Date on FEED.
• Add Follow status to Profile, following, not following, friends.
• And many more customization options...
• Supports iPadOS.


IPA & TrollStore Version:
  • Instructions from here...


    • · OR copy this source and add it to ur source list on Altstore, Esign etc..
    · https://repo.ikghd.me/repo.json

    Refund Policy:
    · Refund accepted if you encounter issues such as safe mode or the tweak not working.
    · Must provide full details about the issue, including photos & crash logs.
    · Change of mind is not accepted; you can see details with photos & videos before buying.
    · If refund is accepted, processing will take 3 to 7 days.
    · Thank you 🤗 & enjoy!


    Subscription | Key & Devices:
    · 1-year subscription (364 days).
    · The key is for 1 device and is transferable.


    Refer to the FAQ page for more info:
  • FAQ page
